prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-SHOEODOR-DHF20-SD Product Type: TEXTILE_DEODORIZER Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 10PC Odor and Moisture Eliminating Shoe Refills Description: Our Odor And Moisture Eliminating Shoe Refills give you freshness wherever you need it. Our packets work for almost any type of shoe. They can also be used in gym bags, camera bags, gun safes, and more. These refills are the perfect addition to eliminate odors.

Our packets eliminate moisture and trap odors quickly for up to 15 days. Use with almost any kind of shoe for long-lasting freshness. The packets can be used with more than just shoes. Use them in gym bags, camera bags, gun safes, and more. The packets are quick and easy to use. Simply place a packet into the dehumidifier sleeve* and store where desired. After 15 days of use, remove the packet from the sleeve and throw away.

Please Note: Blue dehumidifier sleeves not included with this product. Search Terms: ASR Outdoor 10PC Odor and Moisture Eliminating Shoe Refills hunting fishing camping boating fitness Features: - 10 REFILL PACKETS - There are 10 odor and moisture eliminating shoe refill packets included - PROTECTS AGAINST MOISTURE AND HUMIDITY - This item removes moisture and keeps humidity at bay to protect your valuable belongings. The packets lock in odor, so you can use them to get rid of and prevent unwelcome smells in your car, gym bag, pet area, shoes, shoe closet, etc. - USE FOR UP TO 15 DAYS - You can use this item for up to 15 days after they are removed from the plastic pouch. - VERSATILE PROPERTIES THAT ALLOW YOU TO USE ANYWHERE - This product can be used for closets, safes, storage containers and cases, drawers, garages, storage rooms, and more. - GREAT GIFT - Give this to the person in your life that always has stinky feet. It is a gift that will surely be appreciate not only by the recipient but those around them. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10-pk Odor and Moisture Eliminating Shoe Refills

openai.title_differentiation: 10 Pack, Up To 15 Days, Odor And Moisture Control, For Shoes, Gym Bags, Closets, Safes, Versatile Use, Long-Lasting Freshness
